summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend test of Certificate Manual Create & Full-field Edit persistence. All 13 backend pytest cases PASSED and end-to-end UI flow (login → create × 2 for same student → edit persistence after reload → PNG download → status Ready) PASSED. Persistence bug fix (is_manually_edited / is_manually_created short-circuit in _enrich_certificate_with_live_data) is verified across list, get, download and public verify.

issues: React hydration warning: <span data-ve-dynamic="true"> wrapper is being rendered as a child of <tbody>/parent of <tr>, causing HTML validation warnings in console. Cosmetic only, no functional impact. Likely caused by the visual-editor `<span>` wrappers around dynamic list items.

action_items: (Optional) Fix hydration warning by not wrapping <tr> in a <span> when data-ve-dynamic wrapper is applied inside <tbody> — purely cosmetic.
No functional action items — both new features (manual create + full-field editable persistence) work correctly and are ready to git-pull to live.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is very large (16k+ lines). Consider splitting the certificate module into a router file for maintainability (non-blocking).
generate_registration_number in manual create uses count_documents(); under concurrent creates this can collide. Consider a Mongo counter/uuid-based scheme.
Enrichment correctly short-circuits on is_manually_edited/is_manually_created — verified in list/get/download/verify paths.
test_credentials: admin@etieducom.com / admin@123 ; placement@etieducom.com / placement@123 used as non-cert role proxy for 403 tests
seed_data_creation: Test data created during runs (UI_Student_*, EDITED_NAME_*, TEST_*) was cleaned up post-test via DELETE /api/certificate-requests/{id}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_certificate_manual_and_edit.py; run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_certificate_manual_and_edit.py -v`. It self-cleans created certs via module-scope teardown. Uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from env. Placement Manager is used to prove non-cert role gets 403 (Counsellor/FDE/Branch Admin share the same code path in `if current_user.role not in [ADMIN, CERTIFICATE_MANAGER]` guard).
rca of the issue: Original bug: _enrich_certificate_with_live_data overwrote edited fields from source collections on every read. Fix: added early-return `if cert.get('is_manually_edited') or cert.get('is_manually_created'): return cert`. PUT endpoint now sets is_manually_edited=True on every edit; POST /manual sets both flags. Verified end-to-end: edits made via PUT survive subsequent GET (single & list), download payload, and public verify response.
